codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses both previously blocking scrutiny failures. GET /api/actions now validates malformed/non-numeric and negative pagination values with 400 and caps limit to 100, while detectActions now prevents duplicate (contactId, actionType) proposals within a single batch via in-memory dedup in addition to DB checks. Added targeted tests cover the required scenarios, and no regressions were identified in the reviewed scope.

summary: Pass. Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 9dede51 diff, and prior failed reviews for phase2-actions-api-routes and phase2-agent-skeleton. Both original blocking issues are resolved and no new blocking/non-blocking regressions were found in this fix scope.
